title: Liberty.
content:
Those ills that mortal men endure
    So long, are capable of cure,
    As they of freedom may be sure;
    But, that denied, a grief, though small,
    Shakes the whole roof, or ruins all.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Liberty."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
